mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, tenant_nm, tenant_desc, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, subscription_status, max_users, current_users, storage_limit, used_storage, subscription_start_dt, subscription_end_dt, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_tenant WHERE subscription_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY tenant_nm ASC

SELECT tenant_id, tenant_nm, tenant_desc, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, subscription_status, max_users, current_users, storage_limit, used_storage, subscription_start_dt, subscription_end_dt, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_tenant ORDER BY tenant_nm ASC

SELECT tenant_id, tenant_nm, tenant_desc, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, subscription_status, max_users, current_users, storage_limit, used_storage, subscription_start_dt, subscription_end_dt, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_tenant WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tenant ( tenant_id, tenant_nm, tenant_desc, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, subscription_status, max_users, current_users, storage_limit, used_storage, subscription_start_dt, subscription_end_dt, reg_dt, upd_dt ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tenantNm}, #{tenantDesc}, #{contactName}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{subscriptionStatus}, #{maxUsers}, #{currentUsers}, #{storageLimit}, #{usedStorage}, #{subscriptionStartDt}, #{subscriptionEndDt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_tenant SET tenant_nm = #{tenantNm}, tenant_desc = #{tenantDesc}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, subscription_status = #{subscriptionStatus}, max_users = #{maxUsers}, current_users = #{currentUsers}, storage_limit = #{storageLimit}, used_storage = #{usedStorage}, subscription_start_dt = #{subscriptionStartDt}, subscription_end_dt = #{subscriptionEndDt}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
